(1) These rules may be called the Chartered Accountants (Election to the Counci I) (Amendment) Rules, 2011. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Chartered Accountants (Election to the Council) Rules, 2006, in clause 7, the second proviso shall be omitted. [F. No. 2/8/2010-Pl] Dr. T. V. SOMANATHAN, Jt. Secy. (1) These rules may be called the Company Secretaries (Election to the Council) (Amendment) Rules, 2011. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Company Secretaries (Election to the Council) Rules, 2006, in clause 7, the second proviso shall be omitted. [F. No. 2/8/2010-P1] Dr. T. V. SOMANATHAN, Jt. Secy. (1) These rules maybe called the Cost and Works Accountants (Election to the Council) (Amendment) Rules, 2011. (2) They shal I come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Cost and Works Accountants (Election to the Council) Rules, 2006, in clause 7, the second proviso shall be omitted. [F. No. 2/8/2010-P1] Dr. T. V. SOMANATHAN, Jt. Secy. Note : The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub- section (i) vide number GS.R. 712(E), dated the 17th November, 2006 and subsequently amended vWenumber GS.R. 554(E), dated the 23rd July, 2008.
